business.thesis: Apple 的核心不是单一硬件销量，而是高端设备装机基数、芯片/系统/服务一体化和渠道控制力。短期关注 iPhone 17 周期和 WWDC26 AI 进展，中期关注服务监管、供应链地域迁移和自研芯片路线。
riskNotes: iPhone 仍贡献约半数年度收入，单一产品周期风险较高。

supplyChain.thesis: Apple 采用轻资产设计与重度外包制造模式。Tata Electronics 泄露事件显示，未发布 iPhone 的主板、电池、摄像头和芯片资料会把 Apple 极力保护的供应商映射暴露出来；因此本页把供应链拆成最终组装/模组、半导体显示电池、再上游设备材料三层，并用 Apple 官方供应商名单交叉核验公开可确认的企业。

scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: India manufacturing diversification raises the importance of regional partners such as Tata Electronics. The breach shows assemblers hold engineering data capable of exposing mainboard, battery, camera, and supplier mappings.

scarceLayers.name: 供应链信息安全与供应商映射
scarceLayers.nameZh: 供应链信息安全与供应商映射
scarceLayers.whyScarce: 此次泄露本身不等同于生产中断，但它暴露了 Apple 对供应商映射、工程文档和区域制造伙伴访问控制的依赖。若后续审计收紧，Tata 或其他制造伙伴可能需要投入更多安全整改和流程隔离。
scarceLayers.whyScarceZh: 此次泄露本身不等同于生产中断，但它暴露了 Apple 对供应商映射、工程文档和区域制造伙伴访问控制的依赖。若后续审计收紧，Tata 或其他制造伙伴可能需要投入更多安全整改和流程隔离。
scarceLayers.whyScarceEn: The leak itself is not the same as a production interruption, but it exposes Apple’s dependence on supplier mapping, engineering documents, and access control at regional manufacturing partners. If audits tighten, Tata or other manufacturing partners may need more security remediation and process separation.

failureConditions.condition: 如果 Tata/Apple 后续确认泄露范围有限、未涉及有效供应商映射，且审计没有导致产能或交付流程变化，则该风险权重应下调。
failureConditions.conditionZh: 如果 Tata/Apple 后续确认泄露范围有限、未涉及有效供应商映射，且审计没有导致产能或交付流程变化，则该风险权重应下调。
failureConditions.conditionEn: Reduce this risk weight if Tata/Apple later confirm the scope was limited, no usable supplier mapping was exposed, and audits do not change capacity or delivery processes.
failureConditions.monitor: 跟踪 Tata 与 Apple 后续声明、取证审计结果、印度制造产能安排、供应商访问控制整改和新机量产节奏。
failureConditions.monitorZh: 跟踪 Tata 与 Apple 后续声明、取证审计结果、印度制造产能安排、供应商访问控制整改和新机量产节奏。
failureConditions.monitorEn: Track Tata and Apple statements, forensic-audit results, India manufacturing capacity plans, supplier access-control remediation, and new-iPhone production timing.

supplyChain.thesisZh: Apple 采用轻资产设计与重度外包制造模式。Tata Electronics 泄露事件显示，未发布 iPhone 的主板、电池、摄像头和芯片资料会把 Apple 极力保护的供应商映射暴露出来；因此本页把供应链拆成最终组装/模组、半导体显示电池、再上游设备材料三层，并用 Apple 官方供应商名单交叉核验公开可确认的企业。
supplyChain.thesisEn: Apple uses a design-led, heavily outsourced manufacturing model. The Tata Electronics breach reportedly exposed supplier mapping for unreleased iPhone mainboard, battery, camera, and chip materials; this page therefore separates final assembly/modules, semiconductors-displays-batteries, and upstream equipment/materials, and cross-checks public company links against Apple’s official supplier list.

news.title: Tata Electronics 泄露暴露未发布 iPhone 供应链映射
news.titleZh: Tata Electronics 泄露暴露未发布 iPhone 供应链映射
news.titleEn: Tata Electronics breach reportedly exposed unreleased-iPhone supplier mapping
news.summary: 公开报道显示，Tata Electronics 数据泄露涉及超过 20 万个文件，包含未发布 iPhone 18 Pro 的零件清单、供应商映射、主板、电池、摄像头系统和 A20 Pro/芯片相关资料。
news.summaryZh: 公开报道显示，Tata Electronics 数据泄露涉及超过 20 万个文件，包含未发布 iPhone 18 Pro 的零件清单、供应商映射、主板、电池、摄像头系统和 A20 Pro/芯片相关资料。
news.summaryEn: Public reports say the Tata Electronics breach involved more than 200,000 files, including parts lists, supplier maps, mainboard, battery, camera-system, and A20 Pro/chip-related materials for the unreleased iPhone 18 Pro.
news.impact: 短期更像供应链信息安全与保密风险，而非已确认生产中断；中期需要观察 Apple 对 Tata、印度制造伙伴和关键模组供应商的安全审计是否影响量产节奏。
news.impactZh: 短期更像供应链信息安全与保密风险，而非已确认生产中断；中期需要观察 Apple 对 Tata、印度制造伙伴和关键模组供应商的安全审计是否影响量产节奏。
news.impactEn: Near term this is more a supply-chain information-security and secrecy risk than a confirmed production disruption; mid term, watch whether Apple security audits of Tata, India manufacturing partners, and key module suppliers affect production timing.

news.impactEn: The item supports the services-platform value narrative, while App Store regulation and commission pressure still need monitoring.

themeExposure.rationaleZh: 公司通过终端硬件、芯片设计和服务生态影响上游需求，但在半导体热潮中通常不如关键制造和材料环节紧密。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: The company affects upstream demand through devices, chip design, and services, but in a semiconductor boom it is usually less tightly linked than critical manufacturing and materials layers.
